title: task
description: lichen/subsys/lichen/link/lichen_link_tx.c:130-135 - When schnorr48_sign_frame() fails, the early return wipes payload_buf and compressed but not l2_payload. The l2_payload buffer contains SCHC-compressed packet data (dispatch byte + compressed payload). While not secret material, this is inconsistent with the thorough wiping at the cleanup label (lines 270-274) which wipes all three buffers. Low impact since the data is not cryptographic secrets.
close_reason: Fixed: sign fail now uses goto cleanup instead of early return, ensuring l2_payload is wiped consistently with other buffers
